prediction:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.customer_id, c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_id, c.customer_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS paid_order_count
| ORDER paid_order_count DESC, c.customer_id ASC
repair_actions: Added an ORDER step to sort customers by their paid order count in descending order (and by customer_id for deterministic tie-breaking).
